name: Cow Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, cook the hamburger, sausage, and finely chopped onion on low heat until fully cooked.
2. Drain any excess fat from the meat mixture.
3. Slowly add the cheese (cheddar, hot pepper, and parmesan) to the meat mixture and continue cooking until melted.
4. Spread the mixture evenly on slices of rye bread.
5. Place the assembled patties in a preheated oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Bake for 4 minutes or until heated through.
